posts.cookedHtml: After user submit the details of his travel, the user needs to update some information based on the distance and the cost he did it in the travel, If the edit in the form link available this will decrease the number of manually work and edit the item by us as technical support

posts.author: julie856batson (Julie Batson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Kefah Kefah:

After user submit the details of his travel, the user needs to update some information based on the distance and the cost he did it in the travel, If the edit in the form link available this will decrease the number of manually work and edit the item by us as technical support

Hello @hussien,
Providing users an editable form link post-submission allows direct updates to distance and cost, reducing manual interventions and streamlining support efforts.

Best Regards,
Julie Batson
